market_structure.notes: Market paused after hitting 4757. Price retraced perfectly to the Red and Blue Moving Averages confluence. Money Flow turned green.

reasons: Trend continuation setup after a healthy pullback.
Clear bounce off dynamic MA support.
Sector correlation highly bullish (Silver and Platinum flying).
trades.raw_context_excerpt: C'est une configuration classique de 'Buy the Dip' (Achat sur Repli) dans une tendance ultra-haussière... L'Or affiche +3.25%.
trades.notes: Classic trend-following strategy using EMAs as dynamic support.

market_structure.notes: Price broke the 4752 ceiling, pushed to 4765, and retraced to test the former resistance as new support.

reasons: Classic polarity flip (Resistance turned Support).
Green EMA acting as structural floor.
Macro environment remains Risk-Off (Equities dropping, Metals rising).
trades.raw_context_excerpt: C'est la configuration classique du 'Break & Retest'. Attends le repli vers 4753 pour un ratio risque/récompense optimal.
trades.notes: Mentor advised patience to enter at 4753 via limit order rather than chasing at 4758.

market_structure.notes: Violent downward wick to 4848 immediately bought up, forming a bullish hammer candle just before US Open.

reasons: Clear stop hunt (shakeout) of early long positions.
Price action validation via long lower wick.
Maintaining the 4850 key structural support.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: La mèche de rejet sur 4848 est un excellent signal technique. Tu peux tenter un achat sur un petit repli vers 4852.
trades.notes: Pre-market volatility used to secure a better average entry price.

market_structure.notes: User wanted to short immediately at 4827.5. Mentor warned against shorting a bounce and advised waiting for resistance.

reasons: Selling into an active bounce is counter-trend and risky.
Optimal short entry is at dynamic resistance (Red MA) around 4832-4835.
Requires a rejection wick to validate the entry.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Shorter à 4827 ? Non. Tu es au milieu du rebond technique. Mets un ordre de vente limite à 4834.
trades.notes: Focuses on optimizing entry price by waiting for the 'Kiss of Death' at resistance.

market_structure.notes: Market reopened post-settlement and immediately rejected the Red MA (4823). Downward momentum resumed.

reasons: Validation of the macro de-escalation narrative (Trump news).
Clear technical rejection at dynamic resistance.
Break of local support (4810) opens the door to 4800.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Si le prix casse le petit support local à 4810. Target: Retour vers le chiffre rond 4800 et le plus bas de la veille.
trades.notes: Following the macro shift established in the prior session.

market_structure.notes: Price lost immediate red MA support and is drifting toward the macro Blue MA support line.

reasons: Blue MA (4932) serves as the natural foundation for the trend.
Other metals (Silver, Platinum) remain heavily bullish, suggesting Gold is just lagging.
Buying the dip at a macro moving average offers defined risk.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Mets une alerte à 4934. C'est la zone d'achat idéale pour un rebond à faible risque. Sois patient.
trades.notes: Patience discipline check: advising user not to catch the falling knife at 4940, but wait for 4934.

market_structure.notes: Price compressing tightly in the middle of a range post-gap, forming a bullish pennant.

reasons: Risk-Off environment (Nasdaq dropping, Gold acting as Safe Haven).
Decreasing volume indicating consolidation before expansion.
A breakout above 4675 triggers trend continuation algorithms.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: Une bougie qui clôture au-dessus de 4675. Entrée à la cassure ou sur le retest. Target: 4700.
trades.notes: Macro alignment with falling equities highly supported this technical breakout setup.

market_structure.notes: Price drifting down after rejecting the Red MA, aiming for the long-term Blue MA.

reasons: Market is naturally drawn back to its baseline (Blue MA) after overextension.
Waiting for 4805-4810 avoids catching a falling knife mid-air.
Requires a rejection wick or volume spike at the target zone to validate entry.
trades.raw_context_excerpt: L'Aimant (La Ligne Bleue)... monte vers 4803/4805. C'est l'objectif naturel de cette correction. Mets une alerte à 4810.
trades.notes: Demonstrates avoiding random entries in 'No Man's Land' and relying on established technical anchors.
